mapper.sql: id, course_id, type, title, description, content, file_url, file_name, file_size, cover_url, due_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.update: UPDATE course_resource SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, content = #{content}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, due_at = #{dueAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM course_resource WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM course_resource WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM course_resource WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND type = #{type} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
